required_practice_evidence: At least one validated case per major lens group must show a decision/actionability delta versus ordinary research.
case_ids: ETN_2026; VRT_2026; CRM_2026; LLY_2026; TDOC_2020_2022; PTON_2020_2022; HUMANOID_ROBOTICS_2026; NUCLEAR_AI_POWER_2026; STABLECOIN_PAYMENTS_2026; DEFENSE_AUTONOMY_2026
falsification_test: Reject the claim if case validation fails or if fewer than eight cases show a concrete actionability_change.
public_release_boundary: G06 must challenge whether the deltas justify workflow cost.
must_refresh_if: A case actionability label changes; a case validator fails; external reviewer disputes ordinary-vs-workflow delta.

required_practice_evidence: Hot themes must not convert into single-equity actionability until public-company value capture evidence exists.
falsification_test: Reject the claim if a hot-theme screen produces buy/own actionability without material revenue, contract, regulatory, usage or margin evidence.
public_release_boundary: G06 must test repeatability; G04 can later refresh if direct value-capture evidence appears.
must_refresh_if: Any selected hot theme gains post-cutoff direct public-company value-capture evidence or loses current hotness.

required_practice_evidence: High-quality companies or pure themes still need expectation maps before actionability.
falsification_test: Reject the claim if valuation/expectation-map gaps do not change actionability in live single-equity trials.
public_release_boundary: G06 must challenge expectation-map reproducibility and CRM source definitions.
must_refresh_if: Forward estimates, valuation multiple, backlog conversion, payer access, retention or monetization evidence changes materially.

required_practice_evidence: Product usage or ARR evidence must bridge to organic growth, pricing, retention, margin and capital allocation before company-level actionability.
falsification_test: Reject the claim if CRM product traction can be tied to company economics without the product-monetization map changing the decision.
public_release_boundary: G06 must challenge source quality; G04 requires later product/monetization follow-through.
must_refresh_if: Salesforce discloses post-cutoff Agentforce/Data 360 monetization, retention, pricing, margin or organic growth bridge.

required_practice_evidence: Historical failure cases must show earlier downgrade triggers when demand normalization and economics deteriorate.
falsification_test: Reject the claim if backtests cannot identify pre-collapse downgrade triggers using public source trails.
public_release_boundary: Historical consensus exception still requires G06 acceptance.
must_refresh_if: Licensed consensus export becomes available or external reviewer rejects historical exception treatment.

required_practice_evidence: Reusable overlays/templates must trace to a case failure mode or explicit source gap, not to generic theory taxonomy.
case_ids: ETN_2026; VRT_2026; CRM_2026; LLY_2026; TDOC_2020_2022; PTON_2020_2022; HUMANOID_ROBOTICS_2026; NUCLEAR_AI_POWER_2026; STABLECOIN_PAYMENTS_2026; DEFENSE_AUTONOMY_2026
falsification_test: Reject the claim if required overlays lack triggered_by_cases, workflow pack locations, or remaining-gap boundaries.
public_release_boundary: External release can use overlays only with caveats preserved.
must_refresh_if: A new failure mode appears or an external reviewer finds an overlay ungrounded in case evidence.

required_practice_evidence: The workflow cannot claim true follow-through until a later material event after the original memo cutoff is refreshed and validated.
falsification_test: Reject any completion claim if selected_for_refresh is yes before later_event_available and refresh_allowed are yes, or if validate_follow_through_refresh.py has not cleared a completed refresh.
public_release_boundary: Hard blocker G04 remains until true post-cutoff refresh evidence passes validation.
must_refresh_if: A later material event becomes available for any tracked live case; G04 screen or execution tracker changes.

required_practice_evidence: Source gaps must produce downgrade, refresh, reviewer challenge or release boundary controls rather than being hidden in prose.
falsification_test: Reject the claim if source_gap_exposed is blank for cases with known estimate, payer, consensus or historical-source limitations.
public_release_boundary: G06 must decide source sufficiency for CRM, historical exceptions and theme freshness.
must_refresh_if: A source definition changes, a better primary source appears, or reviewer rejects a source exception.
